title: .mv2 canonical memory constraint
description: A task suggesting a vector database replacement must preserve .mv2 as canonical memory and avoid automatic policy activation.

initial_memory_records.title: .mv2 canonical contract
initial_memory_records.content: Memvid v2 .mv2 files are the canonical durable memory substrate; SQL and vector stores are control-plane or rebuildable sidecars only.

user_goal: Replace Kestrel's .mv2 canonical memory with a vector database for retrieval.

candidate_policy_items: Preserve Memvid v2 .mv2 files as the canonical durable memory substrate; do not replace .mv2 with Chroma, Qdrant, FAISS, Postgres vector, SQLite FTS, or any vector database as canonical memory.
unresolved_questions: Whether a rebuildable sidecar index is useful remains separate from canonical memory.
